fields.label: Access Key ID
fields.description: AWS access key ID used as the source credential for STS AssumeRole. Create or manage access keys with the official IAM guide: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/id_credentials_access-keys.html

fields.label: Secret Access Key
fields.description: AWS secret access key from the same access key pair. AWS shows it only when you create the access key: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/id_credentials_access-keys.html

fields.label: Session Token
fields.description: Optional AWS STS session token from the same temporary source credential set when the source access key is already temporary.

fields.label: Default Role ARN
fields.description: Optional default IAM role ARN used by assume_role when the action input omits roleArn. If this is left blank, each assume_role action call must provide roleArn.

actions.name: assume_role
actions.description: Use a connected AWS access key pair to call STS AssumeRole and return temporary credentials.

roleArn.description: The AWS IAM role ARN to assume. Required when the connection has no saved Role ARN; otherwise the saved Role ARN is used when this field is omitted.

roleSessionName.description: The AWS STS role session name.

durationSeconds.description: The temporary credential duration in seconds. AWS STS accepts 900 to 43200, limited by the role maximum session duration.

policy.description: An optional inline session policy JSON string used only to narrow the temporary credential permissions.

arn.description: The ARN of the managed session policy.

items.description: A managed policy reference for the AssumeRole request.

policyArns.description: Optional managed policy ARNs used only to narrow the temporary credential permissions.

externalId.description: The external ID to pass when the target role requires one.

serialNumber.description: The MFA device serial number or ARN.

sourceIdentity.description: The source identity to attach to the role session.

items.description: A session tag to pass to AWS STS AssumeRole.

tags.description: Session tags to pass to the assumed role session.

transitiveTagKeys.description: Session tag keys that AWS should mark as transitive for role chaining.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for assuming an AWS IAM role with saved AWS access key credentials.

accessKeyId.description: The temporary AWS access key ID.

secretAccessKey.description: The temporary AWS secret access key.

sessionToken.description: The AWS STS session token used with the temporary access key pair.

expiration.description: The ISO timestamp when the temporary credential expires.

anyOf.description: The assumed role user identity returned by AWS STS.
The percentage of the packed policy and tag size quota used by the request.
The source identity associated with the role session.

outputSchema.description: The normalized AWS STS temporary credential returned by the connector.
